extName.message: Sether Shield — PII guard for AI chat

extDescription.message: Catches personal data in your prompt before it reaches ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini. 100% local, nothing leaves your browser.

commandTriggerScan.message: Trigger PII scan on current page

keepTyping.message: Keep typing, I'll flag emails, phone numbers, cards, secrets and more before you send.

pausedMessage.message: Paused. Turn it back on from the toolbar icon.

headsUp.message: Heads up — your prompt still has $COUNT$ sensitive item(s).

footerPrivacy.message: 100% local. No data leaves your browser. No telemetry.
